root_cause: Topology key missing on nodes prevents scheduling
evidence: No nodes contain required topologyKey labels

causes.message: Required topology key is not present on any node
Scheduler cannot evaluate topology spread constraints

pod:topology-key-missing-pod: Topology spread constraints reference missing node labels

likely_causes: Cluster nodes are missing required topology labels
Incorrect topologyKey configured in Pod spec
Node labeling not applied (e.g., missing zone/region labels)
